summary: A neural network that estimates the expected outcome from a position; TD-Gammon learned one by temporal-difference self-play, AlphaZero shares a value head with its policy
Classic dynamic-programming loop alternating policy evaluation and policy improvement; AlphaZero realizes it with MCTS as the improvement operator
Monte Carlo Tree Search: a best-first search that builds an asymmetric tree via repeated simulation; in AlphaZero a neural net replaces the random rollout
Training regime where an RL agent generates its own data by playing copies of itself — no expert games, no hand-coded heuristics; powers TD-Gammon and AlphaZero
The formal model underneath reinforcement learning: states, actions, transition probabilities, rewards, and a discount factor, with the Markov property
